creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do around Florida? Comment "Guide" and I'll send you my interactive Florida map and guide with over 1,000 spots to explore! I did the work for you so you can just hit the road without hours of research and stress!

So you’re looking for a cheap and fun thing to do this weekend in Sarasota, Florida, but have no idea what to do? Then you should definitely check out the Canopy Walk in Myakka River State Park in Sarasota! There are only 74 canopy walks in THE WORLD and this one is right here in Sarasota! 

While you’re at the park, look for 🦌 deer, 🐖 hogs, 🦃 turkeys, and of course, 🐊 gators! Just don’t feed them and stay a safe distance away!

Have you been here? 🧐

#floridastateparks #myakkastatepark #floridahiddengems #floridawildlife #uniqueflorida

transcription.text: I bet you didn't know this hidden gem existed in Florida. Right here in Sarasota at Myakka River State Park is one of only 74 canopy walkways in the world. That's right in the world. Take a short easy hike to the canopy walkway and climb 76 feet into the air to see for miles. You are way above the treetops and the birds are even flying below you. There's also a swinging bridge to walk across that was super fun and a little scary. While at the state park drive around to see some wildlife. I saw these cute little deer and some baby hogs as well as these turkeys. You're guaranteed to see alligators. Just keep a safe distance and don't feed them or molest them. The Florida ecosystem is on full display at this park and it's a great place to unplug for a few hours and just enjoy nature. It costs just a couple dollars per person to enter the state park and it's open from 8 a.m until sunset so it's a cheap and fun thing to do if you're in Sarasota. Save this post and send it to a friend you would want to visit here with and follow along for more great Florida content from a local.
